name: Willie Nile
abstract: Willie Nile (born Robert Anthony Noonan; June 7, 1948) is an American singer-songwriter. In 1980, Nile released his self-titled debut album.

concerts.label: Music for Youth Benefit Concert: The Music of The Who
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Music + Revolution: Greenwich Village in the 1960s
